title: Valley of the Spirits

{{Quote|A deep act of anger occurred here many years ago. It warped the area and now the creatures here reflect that anger. Give them the peace that they deserve, but do not do so in hate.|[[Nos'lyn]]|<ref name="SWG:AaH" />}}
The '''Valley of the Spirits''' was home to the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] [[Unidentified Tusken village/Legends|village]] that was slaughtered by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

==History==
When [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|his mother]] died in his arms, Anakin went on a murderous [[Mission to rescue Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|rampage]], slaughtering every Tusken in the camp.<ref name="AotC" />

When the remains of the camp were found by other Tuskens, they believed that a ghost or demon haunted the area and that it had been the cause of death for the other Tusken Raiders. In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]], following a band of Tuskens at a distance, went to see the site after the Tuskens had left. Luke, unknowingly using [[Psychometry/Legends|Psychometry]] on the scene, was profoundly unsettled and found himself begging Biggs to get them away; later he would describe the feeling as worse than a nightmare and reflect that this was the first time he had ever been truly terrified.<ref name="ANH:TLoLS">''[[A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker]]''</ref>

[[File:RuinedTuskenCamp.jpg|thumb|250px|The ruined Tusken Raider village at the Valley of the Spirits during the Galactic Civil War.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] training to become a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] used a Force-attuned crystal to speak to a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] named [[Nos'lyn]]. The Master gave the spacer two tasks to aid in meditation. First, the initiate traveled to a Force nexus on Tatooine, an [[Oasis (Force nexus)|oasis]] where predatory creatures and their prey lived as harmonious herbivores. However, soon after, the Jedi Master dispatched the trainee to the Valley of the Spirits, where the same species of creatures were all fighting amongst each other at the ruins of the Tusken camp due to the strong aura of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] present there. The spacer was instructed to put the creatures out of their misery.<ref name="SWG:AaH" />

Tusken Raiders visiting the camp often made sacrifices of objects and organics to satisfy the ghost. They usually sacrificed beasts but in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], they [[Mission to Tatooine (Killik Twilight)|kidnapped]] and attempted to sacrifice [[Kitster Chanchani Banai|Kitster Banai]], the painting and brought them back to the Valley of the Spirits, where they planned on sacrificing him to the "angry ghost" that had slain an entire tribe with a "glowing, humming sword." He ironically was an old friend of Anakin's. Kitster was saved by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], also ironically Anakin's son-in-law and daughter respectively.<ref name="TG">''[[Tatooine Ghost]]''</ref>
